ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the beverage product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in cents */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the product is produced */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume percentage */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the product in liters */,
  "image" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the product */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the taste of the product */,
  "food_pairing" TEXT /* Suggestions for food pairings */,
  "promotional_offer" TEXT /* Current promotional offers for the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the catalog */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Craft Beer, Lager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categories */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip or postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
